name: FP32 vs FP16 – 60 Iterations Each (2048×2048 matmul)

precision_comparison.notes: First iteration of each precision includes CUDA warm‑up (63ms for FP32, 135ms for FP16) – excluded from means.

conclusion: FP16 is approximately 3× faster than FP32 for this matrix size, with similar board power (≈77W) and near‑zero reported utilisation. The power‑utilisation mismatch persists in both precisions.
